name: a consumer config with no sources block runs clean processing nothing and writing nothing
command: APP=/tmp/cl564-r62-$$; mkdir -p $APP/rules && printf 'extends: [standard]\n' > $APP/ctp.config.yaml && cd $APP && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --config $APP --force --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z --out-dir $APP/rules 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'total=0 processed=0' e.err && [ ! -d $APP/rules/_project ] && echo empty-sources-config-runs-clean 1>&2; rm -rf $APP
